name: Win-Back
description: Offer a unique per-contact discount code to recently-cancelled subscribers via email + SMS.

args.subject: Win-Back agent initiated
args.body: Created unique coupon code {{coupon.code}} — valid for 14 days.

args.subject: A small thank-you from Bright Smile — 20% off whenever you're ready
args.body:
Hi {{firstName}},

We noticed your subscription with Bright Smile Dental ended recently — totally okay, life moves and so do priorities. No guilt-trip here.

If and when it feels right to come back for a cleaning or a check-up, here's a little welcome-back gesture from our team — 20% off your next visit:

{{coupon.code}}

This code is good for the next 14 days, and you can use it at checkout when you book.

If something about your last experience didn't sit right, I'd genuinely like to hear it — just hit reply. We read every message, and we're always trying to make dental care feel less scary.

Warmly,
The Bright Smile Dental team
Hi {{firstName}}, it's Bright Smile Dental — quick heads up your 20% off code {{coupon.code}} is still good for about a week. Use it whenever you're ready, no pressure either way.

args.subject: Win-Back agent sequence complete
args.body: Delivered email + SMS with coupon {{coupon.code}}. Redemption (if any) will surface as a payment event on the workspace's Stripe Connect account.
